'''Ventrux''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located within the [[Ventrux system/Legends|Ventrux system]] within the [[Thesme sector/Legends|Thesme sector]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]. It was the [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] of [[Jenna Zan Arbor]] and original headquarters of [[Arbor Industries]], although the laboratories were closed down when Jenna relocated to [[Simpla-12]].<ref name="Evil Experiment">''[[Jedi Apprentice: The Evil Experiment]]''</ref>

==Appearances==
*''[[Jedi Apprentice: The Evil Experiment]]'' {{1stm}}
